Ular Tangga Nusantara

Snakes & Ladders of the Archipelago

Choose your costume

Roll the dice. Land on a ladder to climb. Land on a snake to slide. You can lock a die and re-roll the other. Reach square 100 exactly to win.

Menang!

Player wins!

Candi Borobudur
